matrix_page_title: OWASP Cross-Reference Matrix - AI Security Hub
matrix_subtitle: Common security themes mapped across 8 OWASP Top 10 lists — discover how risks connect across domains.
matrix_intro_desc: Security risks don't exist in isolation. Injection appears in APIs, LLMs, web apps, and CI/CD pipelines. Access control failures span every domain. This matrix reveals the universal patterns — helping you build defenses that work across your entire stack.
matrix_table_hint: Click any risk to navigate to its detailed page. Scroll horizontally on mobile.
matrix_deepdive_hint: Expand each theme to see which risks it spans and how they connect.
